title: Signed signals in an addition with out-of-bound index results in an exception

features.name: signed memory with bit-select on accessed element
features.description: Code should include a signed memory access followed by a bit-select on the result, where the bit-select index is out of range for the memory element width
features.snippet:
reg signed ra [1];
always @(posedge clk) rb[0] = ra[0] + ra[0][0];

features.name: addition with mixed memory read and bit-select
features.description: Code should include an addition operation where one operand is a memory read and the other is a bit-select of a memory read from the same memory
